calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-03-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: MR. PADRAIC LACKEY APPEARS THIS DAY IN PROPRIA PERSONA; THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR APPELLANT MIKE GARZA THIS DAY.

THE CLERK ADMINISTERS THE OATH TO RESPONDENT LACKEY, WHO THEN SIGNS THE STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM.

THE COURT TAKES THE BENCH AND HEARS ORAL TESTIMONY PRESENTED BY RESPONDENT PADRAIC LACKEY.

THEREUPON, THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.
